---
title: Students
listing:
  - id: current-students
    contents: students/current/*.qmd
    sort: "date"
    type: custom
    template: _student-listing.ejs
    fields: [name, period, topic, website, publications]
  - id: former-students
    contents: students/former/*.qmd
    sort: "date"
    type: custom
    template: _student-listing.ejs
    fields: [name, period, topic, website, position, publications]
---

## Current Students

:::{#current-students}
:::

## Former Students

:::{#former-students}
:::
